## Checklist

- [ ] Followed conventions in `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete and correct (`title`, `type`, `tags`, `sources`, `last_updated`)
- [ ] `wiki/index.md` updated (if pages were added or removed)
- [ ] `wiki/source-registry.md` updated (if any external URLs were fetched)
- [ ] `wiki/log.md` entry appended
- [ ] Cross-links added to related pages across and within topics
- [ ] No full external content stored — only AI-generated summaries with source URLs
- [ ] No modifications to files in `raw/`
- [ ] Unsourced factual claims tagged with `[needs verification]`
- [ ] Contradictions with existing wiki content noted explicitly
